text.title: CSS-in-JS Basics Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply CSS-in-JS Basics end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: pick-library
step.action: Decide library — see css-in-js-advanced for selection.

step.name: set-conventions
step.action: Codify naming, file layout, prop typing in a convention doc.

step.name: build-primitives
step.action: Build 4–6 primitives (Box, Stack, Text, Button, Card, Input).

step.name: ssr-smoke
step.action: Verify SSR renders without runtime errors; capture page weight.
